prompt:
Create a cinematic vertical-friendly background image for a faceless short-form video.

Short title: 3 Night Verses to Stop the Spiral
Niche: Faith + Psychology + Encouragement
Tone: encouraging, calm, biblical

Requirements:
- No text
- No logos
- No watermarks
- No readable signage
- Clean center composition for captions
- Strong emotional clarity
- Vertical-video friendly composition
- Suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels, and YouTube Shorts
- Avoid extreme close-up faces
- Prefer symbolic, atmospheric, or scenic imagery over identifiable people

Style:
cinematic, dramatic but tasteful, soft lighting, polished, realistic

Short script context:
If you're feeling anxious, watch this before you spiral. Verse one: In peace I will lie down and sleep, for You alone, Lord, make me dwell in safety. Psalm 4:8. Verse two: Cast all your anxiety on Him, because He cares for you. 1 Peter 5:7. Picture handing Him one worry at a time. Verse three: Do not worry about tomorrow; today has enough trouble. Matthew 6:34. Reframe: Night magnifies what morning will shrink. God is already in tomorrow. Prayer: Lord, carry what I can’t, calm what I can’t control, and give me rest while You work. Amen.
